info.description: QuantForg v1.0.0 Release Candidate 1 OpenAPI specification. EXECUTION_ENABLED remains false. No AI endpoints. Generated from FastAPI route registrations.
info.title: QuantForg API

schema.title: Response Register Api V1 Auth Register Post

get.description: List backtest runs for the current user.

post.description: Run an offline backtest. Never places live trades.

get.description: Get one backtest run with simulated trades and metrics.

schema.title: Response List Broker Accounts Api V1 Broker Accounts Get
Response List Broker Connections Api V1 Broker Connections Get
Response List Brokers Api V1 Brokers Get

post.description:
Run the execution safety pipeline. Returns ALLOW | REJECT | RETRY.

Never places a live order. Never calls order_send().

Submit via Execution Gateway.

When ``EXECUTION_ENABLED=false`` (default), responds with HTTP 403
and never calls the broker ``order_send``.

get.description: Returns the aggregated health of the application and its infrastructure dependencies (PostgreSQL, Redis). Responds with HTTP 200 when healthy, 503 when unhealthy.
Returns 200 if the process is alive. Does not check dependencies.

schema.title: Response Liveness Api V1 Health Live Get

get.description: Kubernetes-style readiness probe. Checks PostgreSQL and Redis. Responds with HTTP 200 when ready, 503 when not ready.
Returns request latency, error rate, throughput, cache hit ratio, and job duration metrics. Does not enable execution or AI.

get.description: Alert rules and recent alerts (info / warning / critical).
Audit Center: auth, broker, strategy, risk, execution, paper events.
Monitoring dashboard: system, broker, MT5, API, DB, queue, jobs.

schema.title: Response List Orders Api V1 Orders Get
Response List Organizations Api V1 Organizations Get

post.description: Place a paper order against live MT5 quotes (simulated fill only).

get.description: List open paper positions (marked to live MT5 quotes).
Synchronize and return full portfolio snapshot (read-only).

schema.title: Response List Positions Api V1 Positions Get
Response List Activity Api V1 Profile Activity Get

post.description:
Run the Risk Management Engine before Execution Gateway.

Returns ALLOW | REDUCE_SIZE | REJECT. Never places an order.
Never enables EXECUTION_ENABLED.

schema.title: Response List Devices Api V1 Settings Devices Get
Response List Sessions Api V1 Settings Sessions Get

post.description:
Run the Strategy Runtime pipeline.

Returns NO_ACTION | WATCH | READY | BLOCKED. Never places an order.
Never enables EXECUTION_ENABLED. Never calls order_send().

get.description: List Strategy Runtime signals for the current user (history only).
Returns application name, semantic version, and environment.
List walk-forward validation results for the current user.

post.description: Run walk-forward validation (IS backtest + OOS aggregate).

get.description: Get one walk-forward validation run with IS/OOS report.
